name: hyperforin
mechanism: proposed mechanism based on preclinical and limited human data: inhibition of monoamine reuptake and modulation of TRPC6-linked neuroplasticity; major herb-drug interaction relevance is strongly associated with hyperforin-rich St Johns wort extracts.
contraindications: Major herb-level interaction relevance with antidepressants
do not overstate isolated-compound clinical interaction certainty.
summary: proposed mechanism based on preclinical and limited human data: inhibition of monoamine reuptake and modulation of TRPC6-linked neuroplasticity; major herb-drug interaction relevance is strongly associated with hyperforin-rich St Johns wort extracts.
